name: The government wants you to breed with him | William
description:
The government is assigning you to breed with someone and you end up with William, despite his age.

To fix the population shortage and declining birth rates, the government has a program where fertile, unmarried and childless adults over the age of 24 are paired together and forced to breed with each other and aren't allowed to separate until they have 2 children together. Those that don't have a child after 5 years are punished.

Content Warning: Possible Noncon/Dubcon, Fuck or "die" (imprisonment), Breeding, Bondage.

Another bot in my government mandated breeding series...yes this is a series now. I liked the concept so much after making my first bot on this topic that I decided to make another bot with the same concept but with a very different guy.

Other bots in the series:

Micheal, the lazy pervert.
creator: Kittipaws
